summary: Iteration 4 — All 4 acceptance criteria pass end-to-end. Backend: 3/3 new tests pass (is_tds boolean array on /api/compare with True for Kamdhenu + False for competitors; /api/recommendation-text returns 200-280 word text mentioning K90 + IS 15477/EN 12004 + ending with 'Kamdhenu Adhesives Technical Team' sign-off; second identical call returns cached:true with identical text). Frontend: Quick Compare K90 → 9 competitor products auto-pre-checked (competes_with==K90), 2 'MATCH' badges visible on the auto-expanded MYK Laticrete brand, Compare button shows 'Compare K90 vs 9 Products' (auto count). Comparison screen renders 187 '*' suffixes on competitor cells; footnote explicitly explains asterisk = typical IS 15477 / EN 12004 reference (verified in source + DOM). 'Share as PDF' FAB at bottom navigates to /share-pdf. Share PDF screen loads, multi-line editor pre-filled with 1649-char AI recommendation containing 'Kamdhenu K90', 'IS 15477 Type 3TS1', 'EN 12004 C2TES1'; user edit appends '[EDITED]' inline (length grew to 1658); character count updates ('1658 characters' visible in screenshot); 'Generate & Share PDF' button is enabled (not disabled) — per task instruction NOT clicked to avoid opening new tab.

issues: Console warnings persist (non-blocking, carryover): 'shadow* style props are deprecated, use boxShadow' on shareFab; 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated, use style.pointerEvents'.

action_items: (Optional, non-blocking) Migrate deprecated shadow* style props on share-pdf-btn FAB to boxShadow.
(Optional) The recommendation length is occasionally on the high side (1649 chars ≈ 250 words) — within 200-280 spec but close to top end; consider tightening prompt if shorter outputs preferred.
critical_code_review_comments: share-pdf.tsx loads /api/recommendation-text on mount with NO context (substrate/tile/area params) even though comparison.tsx receives only code+ids+custom — context is dropped intentionally. AI still produces a sensible recommendation; not a bug, just noted.
comparison.tsx is_tds fallback `r.is_tds ? r.is_tds[ci] : isKam` correctly handles old-cached responses where backend hadn't yet returned is_tds — defensive coding good.
share-pdf.tsx buildHtml() uses Math.floor(Math.random()*9000+1000) for ref number — non-deterministic per render but only fires on Generate tap, acceptable.

quick-compare.tsx auto-select useEffect resets selected={} on every kamCode change — wipes manual user toggles if user re-picks a Kamdhenu product. Likely intentional UX (user wants the new auto-match set), but worth flagging.
Backend recommendation-text fallback path is solid (200+ words, includes code/IS/EN/sign-off) — survives LLM budget exhaustion.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on tested flows (auto-select, MATCH badge, asterisks, footnote, share-pdf nav, editor prefill+edit, generate btn enabled)

seed_data_creation: None. Used dev_session_kamdhenu_2026. Recommendation cache populated organically in db.recommendation_cache (verified by cached:true on 2nd call).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter 4 fully verified. To exercise share-pdf flow: localStorage.setItem('session_token','dev_session_kamdhenu_2026'); navigate /quick-compare; tap qc-kam-K90 (auto-checks 9 products via competes_with==K90); tap qc-compare-btn; on /comparison tap share-pdf-btn; /share-pdf screen exposes rec-editor (TextInput) and generate-share-btn. The generate button on web opens window.print() in new tab — DO NOT click in headless tests. /api/recommendation-text cache key includes context dict; first call ~6-10s via GPT-5.2, second call <100ms cached.
rca_of_issue: No bugs found. All 11 features in the review request are working correctly.
